speaker: PORTER
text: Here’s a knocking indeed! If a man were

speaker: PORTER
text: porter of hell gate, he should have old turning the

speaker: PORTER
text:
key.
                 
                (
                Knock
                .
                )
               Knock, knock, knock! Who’s there, i’

speaker: PORTER
text: th’ name of Beelzebub? Here’s a farmer that hanged

speaker: PORTER
text: himself on th’ expectation of plenty. Come in time!

speaker: PORTER
text: Have napkins enough about you; here you’ll sweat

speaker: PORTER
text:
for ’t.
                 
                (
                Knock
                .
                )
               Knock, knock! Who’s there, in th’

speaker: PORTER
text: other devil’s name? Faith, here’s an equivocator

speaker: PORTER
text: that could swear in both the scales against either

speaker: PORTER
text: scale, who committed treason enough for God’s

speaker: PORTER
text: sake yet could not equivocate to heaven. O, come in,

speaker: PORTER
text:
equivocator.
                 
                (
                Knock
                .
                )
               Knock, knock, knock! Who’s

speaker: PORTER
text: there? Faith, here’s an English tailor come hither for

speaker: PORTER
text: stealing out of a French hose. Come in, tailor. Here

speaker: PORTER
text:
you may roast your goose.
                (
                Knock
                .
                )
               Knock, knock!

speaker: PORTER
text: Never at quiet.—What are you?—But this place is

speaker: PORTER
text: too cold for hell. I’ll devil-porter it no further. I had

speaker: PORTER
text: thought to have let in some of all professions that go

speaker: PORTER
text: the primrose way to th’ everlasting bonfire.

speaker: PORTER
text: Anon, anon!

speaker: PORTER
text: I pray you, remember the porter.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Was it so late, friend, ere you went to bed

speaker: MACDUFF
text: That you do lie so late?

speaker: PORTER
text: Faith, sir, we were carousing till the second

speaker: PORTER
text: cock, and drink, sir, is a great provoker of three

speaker: PORTER
text: things.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: What three things does drink especially

speaker: MACDUFF
text: provoke?

speaker: PORTER
text: Marry, sir, nose-painting, sleep, and urine.

speaker: PORTER
text: Lechery, sir, it provokes and unprovokes. It provokes

speaker: PORTER
text: the desire, but it takes away the performance.

speaker: PORTER
text: Therefore much drink may be said to be an

speaker: PORTER
text: equivocator with lechery. It makes him, and it

speaker: PORTER
text: mars him; it sets him on, and it takes him off; it

speaker: PORTER
text: persuades him and disheartens him; makes him

speaker: PORTER
text: stand to and not stand to; in conclusion, equivocates

speaker: PORTER
text: him in a sleep and, giving him the lie, leaves

speaker: PORTER
text: him.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: I believe drink gave thee the lie last night.

speaker: PORTER
text: That it did, sir, i’ th’ very throat on me; but I

speaker: PORTER
text: requited him for his lie, and, I think, being too

speaker: PORTER
text: strong for him, though he took up my legs sometime,

speaker: PORTER
text: yet I made a shift to cast him.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Is thy master stirring?

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Our knocking has awaked him. Here he comes.

speaker: LENNOX
text: Good morrow, noble sir.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Good morrow, both.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Is the King stirring, worthy thane?

speaker: MACBETH
text: Not yet.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: He did command me to call timely on him.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: I have almost slipped the hour.

speaker: MACBETH
text: I’ll bring you to him.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: I know this is a joyful trouble to you,

speaker: MACDUFF
text: But yet ’tis one.

speaker: MACBETH
text: The labor we delight in physics pain.

speaker: MACBETH
text: This is the door.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: I’ll make so bold to call,

speaker: MACDUFF
text: For ’tis my limited service.

speaker: LENNOX
text: Goes the King hence today?

speaker: MACBETH
text: He does. He did appoint so.

speaker: LENNOX
text: The night has been unruly. Where we lay,

speaker: LENNOX
text: Our chimneys were blown down and, as they say,

speaker: LENNOX
text: Lamentings heard i’ th’ air, strange screams of death,

speaker: LENNOX
text: And prophesying, with accents terrible,

speaker: LENNOX
text: Of dire combustion and confused events

speaker: LENNOX
text: New hatched to th’ woeful time. The obscure bird

speaker: LENNOX
text: Clamored the livelong night. Some say the Earth

speaker: LENNOX
text: Was feverous and did shake.

speaker: MACBETH
text: ’Twas a rough night.

speaker: LENNOX
text: My young remembrance cannot parallel

speaker: LENNOX
text: A fellow to it.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: O horror, horror, horror!

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Tongue nor heart cannot conceive nor name thee!

speaker:
MACBETH
               
              AND
               
              LENNOX
text: What’s the matter?

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Confusion now hath made his masterpiece.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Most sacrilegious murder hath broke ope

speaker: MACDUFF
text: The Lord’s anointed temple and stole thence

speaker: MACDUFF
text: The life o’ th’ building.

speaker: MACBETH
text: What is ’t you say? The life?

speaker: LENNOX
text: Mean you his Majesty?

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Approach the chamber and destroy your sight

speaker: MACDUFF
text: With a new Gorgon. Do not bid me speak.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: See and then speak yourselves.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Awake, awake!

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Ring the alarum bell.—Murder and treason!

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Banquo and Donalbain, Malcolm, awake!

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Shake off this downy sleep, death’s counterfeit,

speaker: MACDUFF
text: And look on death itself. Up, up, and see

speaker: MACDUFF
text: The great doom’s image. Malcolm, Banquo,

speaker: MACDUFF
text: As from your graves rise up and walk like sprites

speaker: MACDUFF
text: To countenance this horror.—Ring the bell.

speaker:
LADY
               
              MACBETH
text: What’s the business,

speaker:
LADY
               
              MACBETH
text: That such a hideous trumpet calls to parley

speaker:
LADY
               
              MACBETH
text: The sleepers of the house? Speak, speak!

speaker: MACDUFF
text: O gentle lady,

speaker: MACDUFF
text: ’Tis not for you to hear what I can speak.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: The repetition in a woman’s ear

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Would murder as it fell.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: O Banquo, Banquo,

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Our royal master’s murdered.

speaker:
LADY
               
              MACBETH
text: Woe, alas!

speaker:
LADY
               
              MACBETH
text: What, in our house?

speaker: BANQUO
text: Too cruel anywhere.—

speaker: BANQUO
text: Dear Duff, I prithee, contradict thyself

speaker: BANQUO
text: And say it is not so.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Had I but died an hour before this chance,

speaker: MACBETH
text: I had lived a blessèd time; for from this instant

speaker: MACBETH
text: There’s nothing serious in mortality.

speaker: MACBETH
text: All is but toys. Renown and grace is dead.

speaker: MACBETH
text: The wine of life is drawn, and the mere lees

speaker: MACBETH
text: Is left this vault to brag of.

speaker: DONALBAIN
text: What is amiss?

speaker: MACBETH
text: You are, and do not know ’t.

speaker: MACBETH
text: The spring, the head, the fountain of your blood

speaker: MACBETH
text: Is stopped; the very source of it is stopped.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Your royal father’s murdered.

speaker: MALCOLM
text: O, by whom?

speaker: LENNOX
text: Those of his chamber, as it seemed, had done ’t.

speaker: LENNOX
text: Their hands and faces were all badged with blood.

speaker: LENNOX
text: So were their daggers, which unwiped we found

speaker: LENNOX
text: Upon their pillows. They stared and were distracted.

speaker: LENNOX
text: No man’s life was to be trusted with them.

speaker: MACBETH
text: O, yet I do repent me of my fury,

speaker: MACBETH
text: That I did kill them.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Wherefore did you so?

speaker: MACBETH
text: Who can be wise, amazed, temp’rate, and furious,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Loyal, and neutral, in a moment? No man.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Th’ expedition of my violent love

speaker: MACBETH
text: Outrun the pauser, reason. Here lay Duncan,

speaker: MACBETH
text: His silver skin laced with his golden blood,

speaker: MACBETH
text: And his gashed stabs looked like a breach in nature

speaker: MACBETH
text: For ruin’s wasteful entrance; there the murderers,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Steeped in the colors of their trade, their daggers

speaker: MACBETH
text: Unmannerly breeched with gore. Who could refrain

speaker: MACBETH
text: That had a heart to love, and in that heart

speaker: MACBETH
text: Courage to make ’s love known?

speaker:
LADY
               
              MACBETH
text: Help me hence, ho!

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Look to the lady.

speaker: MALCOLM
text: Why do we hold our tongues,

speaker: MALCOLM
text: That most may claim this argument for ours?

speaker: DONALBAIN
text: What should be spoken here, where our fate,

speaker: DONALBAIN
text: Hid in an auger hole, may rush and seize us?

speaker: DONALBAIN
text: Let’s away. Our tears are not yet brewed.

speaker: MALCOLM
text: Nor our strong sorrow upon the foot of motion.

speaker: BANQUO
text: Look to the lady.

speaker: BANQUO
text: And when we have our naked frailties hid,

speaker: BANQUO
text: That suffer in exposure, let us meet

speaker: BANQUO
text: And question this most bloody piece of work

speaker: BANQUO
text: To know it further. Fears and scruples shake us.

speaker: BANQUO
text: In the great hand of God I stand, and thence

speaker: BANQUO
text: Against the undivulged pretense I fight

speaker: BANQUO
text: Of treasonous malice.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: And so do I.

speaker: ALL
text: So all.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Let’s briefly put on manly readiness

speaker: MACBETH
text: And meet i’ th’ hall together.

speaker: ALL
text: Well contented.

speaker: MALCOLM
text: What will you do? Let’s not consort with them.

speaker: MALCOLM
text: To show an unfelt sorrow is an office

speaker: MALCOLM
text: Which the false man does easy. I’ll to England.

speaker: DONALBAIN
text: To Ireland I. Our separated fortune

speaker: DONALBAIN
text: Shall keep us both the safer. Where we are,

speaker: DONALBAIN
text: There’s daggers in men’s smiles. The near in blood,

speaker: DONALBAIN
text: The nearer bloody.

speaker: MALCOLM
text: This murderous shaft that’s shot

speaker: MALCOLM
text: Hath not yet lighted, and our safest way

speaker: MALCOLM
text: Is to avoid the aim. Therefore to horse,

speaker: MALCOLM
text: And let us not be dainty of leave-taking

speaker: MALCOLM
text: But shift away. There’s warrant in that theft

speaker: MALCOLM
text: Which steals itself when there’s no mercy left.
